rule_metadata.author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
rule_metadata.title: Mimikatz Module Names

rules.rule_text:
title: Mimikatz Module Names
id: 8628d9d9-3a53-4d2e-b1cf-1d2e606cfd1d
status: experimental
description: "Identifies processes in which Mimikatz module names are observed as\
  \ command-line parameters. \nPart of the RedCanary 2024 Threat Detection Report.\n"
references:
- https://redcanary.com/threat-detection-report/threats/mimikatz/
author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
date: 2024/03/21
tags:
- attack.credential_access
- attack.t1003
- attack.s0002
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    CommandLine|contains:
    - sekurlsa::logonpasswords
    - lsadump::sam
    - sekurlsa::tickets
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: low
